insights.title: Tuition costs / Living expenses
insights.description: The increasing cost of living on the Nile may affect students' ability to afford tuition and living expenses

evidence.explanation: The increasing cost of living on the Nile may affect students' ability to afford tuition and living expenses

insights.title: Competitor universities
insights.description: Students are looking for alternative universities with more reasonable prices, potentially threatening Nile University's enrollment

evidence.explanation: Students are looking for alternative universities with more reasonable prices, potentially threatening Nile University's enrollment; Zewail University's system is harsh, implying a potential advantage for Nile University's ITCS AI faculty; October 6 University has distinct faculties that may attract students away from Nile University's ITCS AI faculty

insights.title: Limited language support
insights.description: The university's lack of support for languages other than English may hinder its ability to attract international students or compete in a global market

evidence.explanation: The university's lack of support for languages other than English may hinder its ability to attract international students or compete in a global market

insights.title: Affordability and discounts
insights.description: Nile University offers a 10% discount for cash payments, making it a more affordable option for students

evidence.explanation: Nile University offers a 10% discount for cash payments, making it a more affordable option for students

insights.title: Competitor university gap
insights.description: Cairo University's lack of a computer science and communications major may drive students to Nile University instead

evidence.explanation: Cairo University's lack of a computer science and communications major may drive students to Nile University instead

insights.title: Tuition costs
insights.description: Nile University's high tuition costs and new GPA requirement may deter potential students

evidence.explanation: Nile University's high tuition costs and new GPA requirement may deter potential students; Students may face increased tuition costs if they don't maintain their GPA after the first year; High tuition fees at Nile University may lead students to consider transferring to another university due to financial constraints

insights.title: Competition from public universities
insights.description: A student warns others that public universities offer more flexibility, convenience, and lower expenses, making Nile University a potentially regrettable choice

evidence.explanation: A student warns others that public universities offer more flexibility, convenience, and lower expenses, making Nile University a potentially regrettable choice

insights.title: Lack of industry recognition
insights.description: The university degree may not be recognized or valued by employers, and may not prepare students for the job market

evidence.explanation: The university degree may not be recognized or valued by employers, and may not prepare students for the job market; Computer science graduates may not be registered in the Engineers Syndicate, potentially affecting their professional status

insights.title: University reputation irrelevance
insights.description: The post suggests that attending a specific university, such as Nile University, does not provide a competitive advantage in the job market

evidence.explanation: The post suggests that attending a specific university, such as Nile University, does not provide a competitive advantage in the job market

insights.title: Economic pressures
insights.description: Students are considering withdrawing expenses from MSA after being accepted to Nile University, indicating potential financial difficulties

evidence.explanation: Students are considering withdrawing expenses from MSA after being accepted to Nile University, indicating potential financial difficulties

insights.title: Negative university reputation
insights.description: Students from various universities, including possibly Nile University, are discouraging others from joining, indicating a negative perception of the university

evidence.explanation: Students from various universities, including possibly Nile University, are discouraging others from joining, indicating a negative perception of the university

insights.title: Student dissatisfaction
insights.description: A student expressed dissatisfaction with the university, implying that other universities are better

evidence.explanation: A student expressed dissatisfaction with the university, implying that other universities are better

insights.title: Course workload and passing requirements
insights.description: The faculty's course workload and passing requirements may be too stringent, potentially affecting student performance and retention.

evidence.explanation: The faculty's course workload and passing requirements may be too stringent, potentially affecting student performance and retention.

insights.title: Poor treatment by faculty
insights.description: Students feel they are not being treated well by professors and assistants at Nile University's ITCS AI faculty

evidence.explanation: Students feel they are not being treated well by professors and assistants at Nile University's ITCS AI faculty

insights.title: Limited program offerings
insights.description: Nile University lacks nursing and health sciences programs, potentially attracting students to competitor universities

evidence.explanation: Nile University lacks nursing and health sciences programs, potentially attracting students to competitor universities
